'''podayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hued|hued]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hued|hued]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| podayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:podayithi|podayithi]] || [[word:podayiji|podayiji]] || [[word:podayishi|podayishi]] || [[word:podayiki|podayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:podayuthuthu|podayuthuthu]] || [[word:podayujuju|podayujuju]] || [[word:podayushushu|podayushushu]] || [[word:podayukuku|podayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:podayuthu|podayuthu]] || [[word:podayuju|podayuju]] || [[word:podayushu|podayushu]] || [[word:podayuku|podayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:podayufthuf|podayufthuf]] || [[word:podayufjuf|podayufjuf]] || [[word:podayufshuf|podayufshuf]] || [[word:podayufkuf|podayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:podayethe|podayethe]] || [[word:podayeje|podayeje]] || [[word:podayeshe|podayeshe]] || [[word:podayeke|podayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:podayothotho|podayothotho]] || [[word:podayojojo|podayojojo]] || [[word:podayoshosho|podayoshosho]] || [[word:podayokoko|podayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:podayotho|podayotho]] || [[word:podayojo|podayojo]] || [[word:podayosho|podayosho]] || [[word:podayoko|podayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:podayofthof|podayofthof]] || [[word:podayofjof|podayofjof]] || [[word:podayofshof|podayofshof]] || [[word:podayofkof|podayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:podayÃŸfthÃŸf|podayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfjÃŸf|podayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfshÃŸf|podayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfkÃŸf|podayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:podayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|podayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|podayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|podayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|podayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:podayÃŸfthÃŸf|podayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfjÃŸf|podayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfshÃŸf|podayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfkÃŸf|podayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:podayÃŸfthÃŸf|podayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfjÃŸf|podayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfshÃŸf|podayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:podayÃŸfkÃŸf|podayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:podayÃḊthÃḊ|podayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:podayÃḊjÃḊ|podayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:podayÃḊshÃḊ|podayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:podayÃḊkÃḊ|podayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:podayathatha|podayathatha]] || [[word:podayajaja|podayajaja]] || [[word:podayashasha|podayashasha]] || [[word:podayakaka|podayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:podayatha|podayatha]] || [[word:podayaja|podayaja]] || [[word:podayasha|podayasha]] || [[word:podayaka|podayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:podayafthaf|podayafthaf]] || [[word:podayafjaf|podayafjaf]] || [[word:podayafshaf|podayafshaf]] || [[word:podayafkaf|podayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:podayasha|podayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:podayshÃḋsha|podayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podayrosha|podayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podaymusha|podaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:podayasha|podayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodaynkshÃḋsha|gopodaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodaynkrosha|gopodaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodaynkmusha|gopodaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodaynkyasha|gopodaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:podadayasha|podadayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podadayshÃḋsha|podadayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podadayrosha|podadayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podadaymusha|podadaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podadayasha|podadayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodadaynkshÃḋsha|gopodadaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodadaynkrosha|gopodadaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodadaynkmusha|gopodadaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodadaynkyasha|gopodadaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pedÃḊyasha|pedÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pedÃḊyshÃḋsha|pedÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pedÃḊyrosha|pedÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pedÃḊymusha|pedÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pedÃḊyasha|pedÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopedÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gopedÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopedÃḊynkrosha|gopedÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopedÃḊynkmusha|gopedÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopedÃḊynkyasha|gopedÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:podfayasha|podfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podfayshÃḋsha|podfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podfayrosha|podfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podfaymusha|podfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podfayasha|podfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodfaynkshÃḋsha|gopodfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodfaynkrosha|gopodfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodfaynkmusha|gopodfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodfaynkyasha|gopodfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
